Display.multi_display: Simultaneous LCD and CRT, 180 degree tilt

memory.slots: 2 sockets for two JEDEC 88 pin EDO SO DIMMs of 8 or 16 MB (acts like fast page)

display_options: 10.4" TFT SVGA color 800x600, 65,536 simultaneous colors, Black Matrix TFT, 100 to 1 contrast
12.1" TFT SVGA color 800x600, 65,536 simultaneous colors, Black Matrix TFT, 100 to 1 contrast

storage.optical: None (diskette bay is called UltraBay; cannot install internal CD-ROM)

Battery.capacity: 10.4" models: 3.8 hrs (1 batt), 7.6 hrs (2 batts); 12.1" models: 3.5 hrs (1 batt), 7 hrs (2 batts)

ports: 2 x Type I/II or 1 x Type III PCMCIA
Infrared ports (front and back) with IrDA 1.0, up to 115 kbs
Telephone/answering machine/full duplex speakerphone (via Mwave DSP)
audio: Mwave MDSP2780 DSP with modem, fax, audio, telephony function
16-bit audio chip on planar with Mwave DSP
Internal stereo speakers (0.5W), slide volume control, internal microphone
keyboard: Full-size 85-key keyboard, automated tilt up keyboard (5.5 degrees)

physical.dimensions: 10.4" models: 11.7 x 8.3 x 1.74 inches (169 cubic inches); 12.1" models: 11.7 x 8.3 x 1.92 inches (186 cubic inches)

security: Security latch for keyboard and DIMMs
